revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Kk]] to [[Category:&action=edit]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:&action=edit]] to [[Category:Uncategorized original categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Uncategorized original categories]] to [[Category:year categories]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.text:
{{Commons category}} {{Death year category header|100|0}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:10th-century deaths]] [[Category:year categories]] [[Category:year categories]] [[Category:attempting to force efresh]] [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Attempting to force efresh]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:New]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: moved categories/interwikis/DEFAULTSORT on [[Category:1000 deaths]]
Text replacement - "\{\{draft categories\|[^]]+\}\}" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude>"
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
revision.text:
{{Commons category}} {{Death year category header|100|0}}
<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude>
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:10th-century deaths]] [[Category:year categories]] [[Category:Categories with 1 members]]
[[en:Category:1000 deaths]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Commons category}} {{Death year category header|100|0}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude> [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:10th-century deaths]] [[Category:year categories]] [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:1000 deaths]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
